parameters.command: timeout 90 python3 /home/ubuntu/research-engine/research.py 'AI LLM models news releases' --emit=compact --quick 2>&1 | head -c 30000

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const isoDate = $('Node 2: Get Current Date').first().json.isoDate; const researchRaw = $('Node 3: Run Research Engine').first().json.stdout || ''; const research = researchRaw.slice(0, 20000) || 'No research data returned.'; const pricing = $('Node 5: Build Pricing Section').first().json.pricingSection; const selectedModel = 'openrouter/free'; const prompt = 'TODAY'S DATE: ' + isoDate + '

RESEARCH DATA — use ONLY these facts, titles, and URLs:
---
' + research + '
---

PRICING SECTION — paste this VERBATIM at the very end of your report:
---
' + pricing + '
---

MANDATORY RULES:
1. Every fact, model name, price, URL must come from RESEARCH DATA or PRICING SECTION above. Do NOT use training memory for any fact.
2. Omit any section with no relevant news. Never write filler text.
3. All pricing = $ per million tokens ($/1M). Never use raw decimals.
4. "Best Local Model" = specific model name only (e.g. Llama 3.3 70B, Phi-4, Qwen3-235B). NEVER a tool/app (LM Studio, Ollama, Jan). Leave blank if no notable local model today.
5. "Featured Models" = tag EVERY model mentioned anywhere in the report.
6. Importance: Critical=frontier model released OR major security issue. High=significant model/pricing. Medium=updates. Low=minor.
7. Source URLs = copy verbatim from RESEARCH DATA. Never construct URLs.
8. Use ## for sections, **bold** for key terms, bullet points for lists. NO markdown tables in the body.
9. "Summary" property = max 280 characters, plain text only.

OUTPUT in this exact order:

First: a JSON block:
```json
{
  "summary": "",
  "category": [],
  "topics": [],
  "providers": [],
  "featured_models": [],
  "importance": "Medium",
  "report_type": "Daily",
  "new_model_released": false,
  "pricing_changed": false,
  "open_source": false,
  "free_promotion": false,
  "worth_installing": false,
  "best_coding_model": "",
  "best_reasoning_model": "",
  "best_local_model": "",
  "best_value_api": "",
  "biggest_release": ""
}
```

Then the 10-section report:
## Executive Summary
## New Model Releases
## Pricing & API Changes
## Open Source Updates
## AI Agent & MCP News
## Coding Tools
## Promotions & Free Tiers
## Notable Research
## Recommendations
## Sources

Then paste the PRICING SECTION verbatim at the very end.'; return { model: selectedModel, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }], temperature: 0.3 }; })() }}

={{ (() => { const parsed = $('Node 7: Parse + markdownToBlocks').first().json; const appended = $('Node 9: Append Block Chunks').first().json; const dateInfo = $('Node 2: Get Current Date').first().json; const emojiMap = { 'Critical': '🔴', 'High': '🟠', 'Medium': '🟡', 'Low': '🟢' }; const emoji = emojiMap[parsed.importance] || '🟡'; const notionUrl = appended.notionPageUrl || 'https://notion.so'; const [y, m, d] = dateInfo.isoDate.split('-'); const months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; const dateDisplay = `${parseInt(d)} ${months[parseInt(m)-1]} ${y}`; const bullets = (parsed.top3Bullets || []).map(b => `• ${b}`).join('
'); return { blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: `🧠 AI Daily Briefing · ${dateDisplay}` } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
${emoji} *Importance: ${parsed.importance || 'Medium'}*

*Today's biggest story:*
${parsed.execSummary || 'See full report for details.'}

*Key highlights:*
${bullets || '• See full report'}` } }, { type: 'actions', elements: [ { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '👉 Full Report' }, url: notionUrl, style: 'primary' } ] } ] }; })() }}
